basic_details.job_title: Kurnool District Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 38 ANM, Typist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Kurnool District ANM, Typist and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. A/1253-1/S. R.D./2025 on the official website. A total of 38 vacancies have been announced through the Kurnool District Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: The age limit for all posts is up to 52 years as on 01-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Various qualifications including 7th Class Pass, 5th Class Pass, SSC, Intermediate, Bachelor's Degree, Diploma in MLT, ANM Course, MPHW Course.
qualification.details: Typist: Bachelor's Degree Assistant Junior: Bachelor's Degree Computer Lab Technician Gr-II: SSC + 2years course in Diploma in MLT, or 1year LT Course after Intermediate, or BSC with BZC in 1st Class, or BSC Life Science in 1st Class with PG Diploma in MLT issued by recognized institutions, or Intermediate Vocational Course MLT with 1year clinical training apprentice in recognized institutions. ANM Gr-III: Intermediate Pass and 18 months training in ANM course, or Intermediate Vocational MPHW course with 1 year apprenticeship. Office Subordinate: 7th Class Pass Public Health Worker: 5th Class Pass Public Health Master: SSC (10th Class) Pass/Equivalent Pass.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Kurnool District Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.kurnool.ap.gov.in, www.nandyal.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Kurnool District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for Kurnool District Recruitment 2026 is 14-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Kurnool District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 38 vacancies for various posts in Kurnool District Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Office Subordinate post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Office Subordinate post is 7th Class Pass.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Kurnool District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is up to 52 years as on 01-07-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q6. Which departments are recruiting in Kurnool District?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for backlog vacancies for differently-abled persons in various departments in Kurnool and Nandyal districts.

faq.question: Q7. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted offline to the Assistant Director, Differently Abled, Hijra and Elderly Welfare Department, Collectorate Complex, Kurnool.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What are the official websites for Kurnool District?
faq.answer: The official websites for Kurnool District are www.kurnool.ap.gov.in and www.nandyal.ap.gov.in.
